tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new client buyer.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsGet
tools.description: Gets a client buyer with a given client account ID.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsInvitationsCreate
tools.description: Creates and sends out an email invitation to access an Ad Exchange client buyer account.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsInvitationsGet
tools.description: Retrieves an existing client user invitation.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsInvitationsList
tools.description: Lists all the client users invitations for a client with a given account ID.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsList
tools.description: Lists all the clients for the current sponsor buyer.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing client buyer.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsUsersGet
tools.description: Retrieves an existing client user.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsUsersList
tools.description: Lists all the known client users for a specified sponsor buyer account ID.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsClientsUsersUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing client user. Only the user status can be changed on update.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesCreate
tools.description: Creates a creative.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesDealAssociationsAdd
tools.description: Associate an existing deal with a creative.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesDealAssociationsList
tools.description: List all creative-deal associations.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesDealAssociationsRemove
tools.description: Remove the association between a deal and a creative.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesGet
tools.description: Gets a creative.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesList
tools.description: Lists creatives.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesStopWatching
tools.description: Stops watching a creative. Will stop push notifications being sent to the topics when the creative changes status.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesUpdate
tools.description: Updates a creative.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsCreativesWatch
tools.description: Watches a creative. Will result in push notifications being sent to the topic when the creative changes status.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsFinalizedProposalsList
tools.description: List finalized proposals, regardless if a proposal is being renegotiated. A filter expression (PQL query) may be specified to filter the results. The notes will not be returned.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsFinalizedProposalsPause
tools.description: Update given deals to pause serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to true for all listed deals in the request. Currently, this method only applies to PG and PD deals. For PA deals, call accounts.proposals.pause endpoint. It is a no-op to pause already-paused deals. It is an error to call PauseProposalDeals for deals which are not part of the proposal of proposal_id or which are not finalized or renegotiating.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsFinalizedProposalsResume
tools.description: Update given deals to resume serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to false for all listed deals in the request. Currently, this method only applies to PG and PD deals. For PA deals, call accounts.proposals.resume endpoint. It is a no-op to resume running deals or deals paused by the other party. It is an error to call ResumeProposalDeals for deals which are not part of the proposal of proposal_id or which are not finalized or renegotiating.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProductsGet
tools.description: Gets the requested product by ID.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProductsList
tools.description: List all products visible to the buyer (optionally filtered by the specified PQL query).

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsAccept
tools.description: Mark the proposal as accepted at the given revision number. If the number does not match the server's revision number an `ABORTED` error message will be returned. This call updates the proposal_state from `PROPOSED` to `BUYER_ACCEPTED`, or from `SELLER_ACCEPTED` to `FINALIZED`. Upon calling this endpoint, the buyer implicitly agrees to the terms and conditions optionally set within the proposal by the publisher.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsAddNote
tools.description: Create a new note and attach it to the proposal. The note is assigned a unique ID by the server. The proposal revision number will not increase when associated with a new note.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsCancelNegotiation
tools.description: Cancel an ongoing negotiation on a proposal. This does not cancel or end serving for the deals if the proposal has been finalized, but only cancels a negotiation unilaterally.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsCompleteSetup
tools.description: You can opt-in to manually update proposals to indicate that setup is complete. By default, proposal setup is automatically completed after their deals are finalized. Contact your Technical Account Manager to opt in. Buyers can call this method when the proposal has been finalized, and all the required creatives have been uploaded using the Creatives API. This call updates the `is_setup_completed` field on the deals in the proposal, and notifies the seller. The server then advances the revision number of the most recent proposal. To mark an individual deal as ready to serve, call `buyers.finalizedDeals.setReadyToServe` in the Marketplace API.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsCreate
tools.description: Create the given proposal. Each created proposal and any deals it contains are assigned a unique ID by the server.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsGet
tools.description: Gets a proposal given its ID. The proposal is returned at its head revision.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsList
tools.description: List proposals. A filter expression (PQL query) may be specified to filter the results. To retrieve all finalized proposals, regardless if a proposal is being renegotiated, see the FinalizedProposals resource. Note that Bidder/ChildSeat relationships differ from the usual behavior. A Bidder account can only see its child seats' proposals by specifying the ChildSeat's accountId in the request path.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsPause
tools.description: Update the given proposal to pause serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to true for all deals in the proposal. It is a no-op to pause an already-paused proposal. It is an error to call PauseProposal for a proposal that is not finalized or renegotiating.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsResume
tools.description: Update the given proposal to resume serving. This method will set the `DealServingMetadata.DealPauseStatus.has_buyer_paused` bit to false for all deals in the proposal. Note that if the `has_seller_paused` bit is also set, serving will not resume until the seller also resumes. It is a no-op to resume an already-running proposal. It is an error to call ResumeProposal for a proposal that is not finalized or renegotiating.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsProposalsUpdate
tools.description: Update the given proposal at the client known revision number. If the server revision has advanced since the passed-in `proposal.proposal_revision`, an `ABORTED` error message will be returned. Only the buyer-modifiable fields of the proposal will be updated. Note that the deals in the proposal will be updated to match the passed-in copy. If a passed-in deal does not have a `deal_id`, the server will assign a new unique ID and create the deal. If passed-in deal has a `deal_id`, it will be updated to match the passed-in copy. Any existing deals not present in the passed-in proposal will be deleted. It is an error to pass in a deal with a `deal_id` not present at head.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsPublisherProfilesGet
tools.description: Gets the requested publisher profile by id.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyer2AccountsPublisherProfilesList
tools.description: List all publisher profiles visible to the buyer

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsBidMetricsList
tools.description: Lists all metrics that are measured in terms of number of bids.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsBidResponseErrorsList
tools.description: List all errors that occurred in bid responses, with the number of bid responses affected for each reason.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsBidResponsesWithoutBidsList
tools.description: List all reasons for which bid responses were considered to have no applicable bids, with the number of bid responses affected for each reason.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsCreate
tools.description: Creates the specified filter set for the account with the given account ID.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the requested filter set from the account with the given account ID.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsFilteredBidRequestsList
tools.description: List all reasons that caused a bid request not to be sent for an impression, with the number of bid requests not sent for each reason.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsFilteredBidsCreativesList
tools.description: List all creatives associated with a specific reason for which bids were filtered, with the number of bids filtered for each creative.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsFilteredBidsDetailsList
tools.description: List all details associated with a specific reason for which bids were filtered, with the number of bids filtered for each detail.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsFilteredBidsList
tools.description: List all reasons for which bids were filtered, with the number of bids filtered for each reason.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsGet
tools.description: Retrieves the requested filter set for the account with the given account ID.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsImpressionMetricsList
tools.description: Lists all metrics that are measured in terms of number of impressions.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsList
tools.description: Lists all filter sets for the account with the given account ID.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsLosingBidsList
tools.description: List all reasons for which bids lost in the auction, with the number of bids that lost for each reason.

tools.name: bidders.adexchangebuyer2BiddersFilterSetsNonBillableWinningBidsList
tools.description: List all reasons for which winning bids were not billable, with the number of bids not billed for each reason.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
